changelog: v3.3.5: Whitelist porte Web Proxy estesa per supporto profili vendor multi-marca. Aggiunte: Synology DSM (5000/5001), Proxmox PVE (8006), TrueNAS legacy (81), QNAP secondary (8088), AdGuard/Pihole (3000), pfSense/OPNsense alt (4444), DirectAdmin (2222), Plesk (8083), iLO XMLagent (17988/17990), Netdata (19999). Risolve errore 'Porta X non consentita' che appariva applicando profili hpe_ilo/synology_dsm/generic_ups al primo apri Web Console via Popup V4. Include tutti i fix v3.3.4 (ASR Defender exclusions), v3.3.3 (updater staged), v3.3.2 (dual-path iLO), v3.3.1 (WMI updater), v3.3.0 (Remediation executor).
